attacks.name: Warp Hole
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, choose a card from your discard pile and put it on top of your deck.

attacks.name: Hypnosplash
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Aqua Trick
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon has any Energy cards attached to it, flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of those Energy cards and move it to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. If your opponent has no Benched Pokémon, ignore this effect.

attacks.name: Sharp Claws
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Squeeze
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Metal Tail
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, you may flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 80 damage. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Energy Burst
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage times the number of Energy attached to Starmie and the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Star Back
attacks.effect: Attach a basic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Giant Tail
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Lightning Sphere
attacks.effect: You may flip a coin. If heads, discard all Lightning Energy cards attached to Raikou. This attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage for each Energy card discarded in this way.

attacks.name: Zzzap
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to each Pokémon with a Poké-Body or Poké-Power (yours and your opponent's). (Don't apply Weakness or Resistance.)

attacks.name: Lightning Storm
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, put 2 damage counters on Raichu.

attacks.name: Spiral Punch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Sudden Growth
attacks.effect: Attach any number of basic Energy cards from your hand to Politoed.

attacks.name: Frog Hop
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Energy Splash
attacks.effect: Move 2 Water Energy cards attached to Politoed to 1 or 2 of your Benched Pokémon. (You may put both on the same Pokémon or 1 each on 2 different Pokémon.) If you have no Benched Pokémon, ignore this effect.

attacks.name: Freezing Breath
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Trample
attacks.effect: For each Benched Pokémon (yours and your opponent's), flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Double Claw
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage for each heads

attacks.name: Collect Fire
attacks.effect: If there are any Fire Energy cards in your discard pile, flip a coin. If heads, attach 1 of them to Moltres.

attacks.name: Burning Tail
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy card attached to Moltres.

attacks.name: Bounce Off
attacks.effect: If Magneton and the Defending Pokémon don't have the same number of Energy cards attached to them, the player controlling the Active Pokémon with the fewest number of Energy cards attached to it switches 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon with his or her Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Magnetic Wave
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage plus 10 damage times the number of your Benched Pokémon minus the number of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (For example, if your opponent has 1 Benched Pokémon and you have 3, this attack will do 30 damage plus 20 more damage.)

attacks.name: Electric Blast
attacks.effect: You may discard all Lightning Energy cards attached to Magneton when you use this attack. If you do, put damage counters equal to the amount of Energy cards removed in this way on any number of your opponent's Benched Pokémon in the way you like. (For example, if you discard 3 Lightning Energy cards, you can put 1 damage counter on 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and 2 on another.)

attacks.name: Crushing Lava
attacks.effect: You may discard a Fire or Fighting basic Energy card attached to Magcargo. If you discard a Fire Energy card in this way, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned. If you discard a Fighting Energy card in this way, this attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Eruption
attacks.effect: Each player discard the top card of his or her deck. This attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage for each Fire Energy card discarded in this way.

attacks.name: Fire Stream
attacks.effect: Discard a Fire Energy card attached to Magcargo in order to use this attack. If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, this attack does 10 damage to each of them. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Drag Off
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, if your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and switch it with the Defending Pokémon. If your opponent has no Benched Pokémon, ignore this effect.

attacks.name: Hurricane Punch
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Pollen Shield
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, Ledian can't become affected by a Special Condition. (Any other effects of attacks, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, and Trainer cards still happen.)

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dual Cut
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 50 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Thundershock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Thunderspark
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each Benched Pokémon with at least 1 Energy card attached to it (yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Ambush
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Lonely Fang
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage plus 20 damage times the number of your opponent's Benched Pokémon minus the number of your Benched Pokémon. (For example, if your opponent has 3 Benched Pokémon and you have 1, this attack will do 30 damage plus 40 more damage.)

attacks.name: Dragon's Vengeance
attacks.effect: If Gyarados has 7 or more damage counters on it, this attack's base damage is 100.

attacks.name: Hydrokinesis
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Spinning Blow
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads. If both coins are heads, switch Forretress with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Scatterbomb
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. For each heads, do 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. For each tails, do 10 damage to each of your own Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Burn Booster
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy card attached to Flareon in order to use this attack. If the discarded card is a Fire Energy card, this attack does 40 damage plus 10 more damage.

attacks.name: Freeze Lock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent can't attach Energy cards from his or her hand to his or her Active Pokémon during his or her next turn.

attacks.name: Crushing Ice
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 damage plus 10 more damage for each Colorless Energy in the Defending Pokémon's Retreat Cost. Damage is calculated using the Defending Pokémon's Retreat Cost after applying effects to the Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Double Cross
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads. If both of them are tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused and Poisoned.

attacks.name: Needle Rush
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. If you get 1 heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage. If you get 2 heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage. If you get 3 heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 50 more damage. If you get 4 heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 90 more damage.

attacks.name: Freeze Solid
attacks.effect: If there are any Water Energy cards in your discard pile, flip a coin. If heads, attach 1 of them to Articuno.

attacks.name: Ice Cyclone
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. If tails, this attack does 10 damage to each of your Pokémon in play. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Shake
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon, if any.

attacks.name: White Flames
attacks.effect: Discard all Fire Energy cards attached to Arcanine.

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Draining Cut
attacks.effect: Remove a damage counter from Kabutops.

attacks.name: Triple Cutter
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Scalding Steam
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy card attached to Ho-oh and flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Earth Bomb
attacks.effect: Golem does 20 damage to itself. This attack also does 10 damage to each Benched Pokémon (yours and your opponent's). (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Poison Flame
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned and Poisoned.

attacks.name: Squared Attack
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Fireblast
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy card attached to Charizard.

attacks.name: Dragon Tail
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 50 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Empathic Healing
attacks.effect: Remove 2 damage counters from Celebi and each Pokémon that's the same type (color) as Celebi.

attacks.name: Mind Bend
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

rules: This card provides Colorless Energy. When you play this card from your hand and attach it to 1 of your Evolved Pokémon, you may remove up to 2 damage counters from that Pokémon and discard the top card from it. (This counts as devolving it.)

This card provides Colorless Energy. When you play this card from your hand and attach it to your Active Pokémon, your opponent switches his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

This card provides ColorlessColorless Energy. You can attach this card to your Pokémon that has basic Energy cards attached to it. When you play this card from your hand and attach it to 1 of your Pokémon, return a basic Energy card attached to that Pokémon to your hand.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.

Once during each player's turn, that player may put an Omanyte or a Kabuto card from his or her discard pile onto his or her Bench. (Cards put on the Bench this way are considered Basic Pokémon.)

You can play only 1 Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Look at the bottom 4 cards of your deck. Put 2 of those cards into your hand, and then return the remaining cards to the bottom of your deck in any order.

Attach Star Piece to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If that Pokémon is Knocked Out, discard this card.

At any time between turns, if the Pokémon this card is attached to is Benched and has 2 or more damage counters on it, search your deck for an Evolution card that Pokémon evolves into and put it on top of that Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon.) Shuffle your deck afterward. Then, discard Star Piece.

You can play only 1 Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Choose 2 cards from your deck and shuffle the rest of your deck. Put the chosen cards on top of your deck in any order.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.

Once during each player's turn (before he or she attacks), if that player has an Evolution card in his or her hand, he or she may search his or her deck for a basic Energy card, show it to his or her opponent, and put it into his or her hand. Then that player chooses an Evolution card from his or her hand, shows it to his or her opponent, and puts it into his or her deck. That player shuffles his or her deck afterward.

attacks.name: Healing Oasis
attacks.effect: If your opponent has 5 or more Prizes, search your deck for up to 3 basic Energy cards, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward. If your opponent has exactly 2 Prizes, remove all damage counters from 1 of your Pokémon.

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Pokémon in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Mystery Plate δ.

attacks.name: Retro Cave
attacks.effect: If your opponent has 5 or more Prizes, shuffle your hand into your deck and then draw 6 cards. If your opponent has exactly 2 Prizes, choose 1 of your opponent's Evolved Pokémon. Your opponent puts the top card on that Evolved Pokémon on the bottom of his or her deck. (This counts as devolving that Pokémon.)

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Pokémon in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Mystery Plate γ.

attacks.name: Stone Crush
attacks.effect: If your opponent has 5 or more Prizes, draw 3 cards. If your opponent has only 1 Prize, choose 2 Energy cards attached to the Defending Pokémon (1 if there is only 1). Your opponent shuffles those cards into his or her deck.

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Pokémon in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Mystery Plate β.

attacks.name: Desert Burn
attacks.effect: If your opponent has 5 or more Prizes, search your deck for a Trainer card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. If your opponent has only 1 Prize, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned, Paralyzed, and Poisoned.

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Pokémon in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Mystery Plate α.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.

Whenever a player tries to retreat a Pokémon during his or her turn, that player flips a coin. If heads, that player retreats that Pokémon (and discards Energy normally). If tails, that Pokémon can't retreat this turn (the player doesn't discard any Energy).

attacks.name: Thunder Force
attacks.effect: If the Pokémon using this attack has Grass and Lightning basic Energy cards attached to it, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep and Poisoned. If the Pokémon using this attack has Water and Lightning basic Energy cards attached to it, this attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage and lets you put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Evolved Grass, Water, or Lightning Pokémon in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Miracle Sphere γ.

attacks.name: Freezing Force
attacks.effect: If the Pokémon using this attack has Fire and Water basic Energy cards attached to it, this attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Burned. If the Pokémon using this attack has Water and Psychic basic Energy cards attached to it, choose an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon, if any, and your opponent shuffles that card into his or her deck.

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Evolved Fire, Water, or Psychic Pokémon in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Miracle Sphere β.

attacks.name: Fire Force
attacks.effect: If the Pokémon using this attack has Fire and Lightning basic Energy cards attached to it, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused. If the Pokémon using this attack has Fire and Fighting basic Energy cards attached to it, this attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage and remove 3 damage counters from the Pokémon that Miracle Plate α is attached to.

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Evolved Fire, Lightning, or Fighting Pokémon in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Miracle Plate α.
Flip 3 coins. For each heads, choose an Evolution card from your discard pile, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand.

Choose 1 of your Pokémon. Discard 1 or 2 basic Energy cards attached to that Pokémon. If you discarded 1 Energy card, remove up to 3 damage counters from that Pokémon. If you discarded 2 Energy cards, remove up to 5 damage counters from that Pokémon.

Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. Search your deck for a Baby Pokémon, Basic Pokémon, or Evolution card of the same type (color), show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You can play only 1 Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Choose 4 basic Energy cards from your discard pile (if there are fewer basic Energy cards than choose, take all of them), show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand.

Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal an Evolution card. Show that card to your opponent and put it into your hand. Shuffle the other revealed cards into your deck. (If you don't reveal an Evolution card, shuffle all the revealed cards back into your deck.)

You can play only 1 Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Shuffle your hand into your deck and draw up to 4 cards. Your opponent does the same.

Attach Crystal Shard to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If that Pokémon is Knocked Out, discard this card.

As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, that Pokémon's type (color) is Colorless. If that Pokémon attacks, discard this card at the end of the turn.

You can play only 1 Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Search your deck for up to 2 Trainer cards with Ball in their names, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You can play only 1 Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Search your deck for up to 2 Supporter and/or Stadium cards, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.

Once during each player's turn (before he or she attacks), if he or she has not played a Supporter card, that player may reveal his or her hand to his or her opponent. If that player reveals his or her hand and there is no Supporter card there, that player draws a card.

attacks.name: Poison Spray
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Sound Waves
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Flitter
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage to that Pokémon. Don't apply Weakness and Resistance. (Any other effects that would happen after applying Weakness and Resistance still happen.)

attacks.name: Agility
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Yanma.

attacks.name: Triple Smash
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Entangling Thread
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Poison Horn
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Fury Attack
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Magnetic Pull
attacks.effect: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and switch it with the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Spin Tackle
attacks.effect: Voltorb does 10 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Double Spin
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Supersonic
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Healing Dust
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. For each heads, remove 1 damage counter from each of your Pokémon. If a Pokémon has fewer damage counters than the number of heads, remove all of them.

attacks.name: Miracle Powder
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, choose a Special Condition (Asleep, Burned, Confused, Paralyzed, or Poisoned). The Defending Pokémon is now affected by that Special Condition.

attacks.name: Bear Hug
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Rend
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage. If not, this attack does 40 damage.

attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Rage
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on Teddiursa.

attacks.name: Overrun
attacks.effect: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of them and this attack does 10 damage to it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Freezing Breath
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Blot
attacks.effect: If there are any damage counters on Sunkern, remove 1 of them.

attacks.name: Energy Plant
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a basic Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Trip Over
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Energy Healing
attacks.effect: Remove 2 damage counters from Staryu for each Energy attached to it. If it has fewer damage counters than that, remove all of them.

attacks.name: Doubleslap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Threaten
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, look at your opponent's hand. If he or she has any Trainer cards there, choose 1 of them. Your opponent shuffles that card into his or her deck.

attacks.name: Antler Swipe
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage to the Defending Pokémon (don't apply Weakness or Resistance). If tails and your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and this attack does 20 damage to it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Scary Face
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, until the end of your opponent's next turn the Defending Pokémon can't attack or retreat.

attacks.name: Continuous Tumble
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Scorching Lava
attacks.effect: Discard a Fire Energy card attached to Slugma in order to use this attack. The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Double Peck
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Spinning Head
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, switch Skarmory with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Poisonous Saliva
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Double Headbutt
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Ice Beam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Cold Breath
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Sand Trap
attacks.effect: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose up to 2 of them. This attack does 10 damage to each of them. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Poison Needle Rush
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads. If you get at least 1 heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Double Scratch
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Dig Under
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage to that Pokémon. Don't apply Weakness and Resistance. (Any other effects that would happen after applying Weakness and Resistance still happen.)

attacks.name: Retaliate
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage times the number of damage counters on Rhyhorn.

attacks.name: Call for Friends
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Baby Pokémon or Basic Pokémon card and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward. (You can't use this attack if your Bench is full.)

attacks.name: Body Slam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Continuous Bite
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. If you get 1 heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage. If you get 2 heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 30 more damage. If you get 3 heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Twiddle
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Double Kick
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Sleep Bubble
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Max Voltage
attacks.effect: Discard all Lightning Energy cards attached to Pikachu. This attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy card discarded in this way.

attacks.name: Poison Claws
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon card named Nidoran ♀ or Nidoran ♂ and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward. (You can't use this attack if your Bench is full.)

attacks.name: Foresight
attacks.effect: Look at the top 3 cards of either player's deck and rearrange them as you like.

attacks.name: Removal Beam
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon has any Energy cards attached to it, flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of those Energy cards and discard it.

attacks.name: Evil Eye
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. Put a damage counter on that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Blindside
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon that has a damage counter on it. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. Don't apply Weakness and Resistance.

attacks.name: Sudden Swipe
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, look at your opponent's hand. If he or she has any Energy cards there, choose 1 of them. Your opponent shuffles that card into his or her deck.

attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads

attacks.name: Aqua Sonic
attacks.effect: Don't apply Resistance.

attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Magnetic Lines

attacks.name: Mind Shock
attacks.effect: Don't apply Weakness and Resistance.

attacks.name: Nap
attacks.effect: Remove 1 damage counter from Jigglypuff.

attacks.name: Lullaby
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Energy Heal
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your Pokémon with an Energy card attached to it. Remove 1 damage counter from that Pokémon.

rules: If your Active Pokémon is a Baby Pokémon and your opponent announces an attack, your opponent flips a coin (before doing anything else). If tails, your opponent's turn ends.

attacks.name: Retaliate
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage times the number of damage counters on Houndour.

attacks.name: Fireworks
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy card attached to Houndour.

attacks.name: Hypnosis
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Eerie Light
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Angry Horn
attacks.effect: If there are 4 or more damage counters on Heracross, this attack's base damage is 50 instead of 30.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Shadow Hand
attacks.effect: You may discard up to 2 cards from your hand. If you do, draw that many cards.

attacks.name: Double Kick
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Fling
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon, if any. (Do the damage before switching the Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Poison Sound Wave
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Strength in Numbers
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each Zubat, Golbat, and Crobat on your Bench.

attacks.name: Sharp Stinger
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Energy Patch
attacks.effect: Take a basic Energy card attached to 1 of your Pokémon and attach it to another of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Syncroblast
attacks.effect: If Girafarig and the Defending Pokémon don't have the same number of Energy cards attached to them, this attack's base damage is 10 instead of 40.

attacks.name: Haunt
attacks.effect: Put a damage counter on the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Shell Rupture
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Double Spin
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Whirlwind
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Leek Rush
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.effect: Eevee does 10 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Tail Shake
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Burrow
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all damage done by attacks to Dugtrio during your opponent's next turn. (Any other effects of attacks still happen.)

attacks.name: Dig Under
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. Don't apply Weakness or Resistance. (Any other effects that would happen after applying Weakness and Resistance still happen.)

attacks.name: Copy
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. Copy copies that attack. This attack does nothing if Ditto doesn't have the Energy necessary to use that attack. (You must still do anything else required in order to use that attack.)

attacks.name: Burrow
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all damage done by attacks to Diglett during your opponent's next turn. (Any other effects of attacks still happen.)

attacks.name: Limited Delivery
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Technical Machine or Pokémon Tool card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Kick Away
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon, if any. (Do the damage before switching the Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Energy Recycle
attacks.effect: Shuffle a basic Energy card from your discard pile into your deck.

rules: If your Active Pokémon is a Baby Pokémon and your opponent announces an attack, your opponent flips a coin (before doing anything else). If tails, your opponent's turn ends.

Evolves into Omanyte, Kabuto, Aerodactyl

You may play a Pokémon card that evolves from Mysterious Fossil on top of Buried Fossil. (This counts as evolving Buried Fossil.) Buried Fossil can't be affected by Special Conditions.

attacks.name: Return Attack
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If either is heads, this attack does 10 damage times the number of damage counters on Wobbuffet.

attacks.name: Water Gun
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage for each Water Energy attached to Starmie but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. You can't add more than 40 damage in this way.

attacks.name: Core Blast
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage for each Special Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Continuous Charge
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage for each heads. Put a damage counter on Piloswine for each heads.

attacks.name: Surprise Slash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, look at your opponent's hand. If he or she has any Trainer cards there, choose 1 of them. You opponent shuffles that card into his or her deck.

attacks.name: Lunge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Water of Evolution
attacks.effect: Put an Omastar from your hand onto Omanyte. This counts as evolving Omanyte.

attacks.name: Drag Off
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, you may choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch it with the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Triple Smash
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Hypnoblast
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Gift of Spite
attacks.effect: Count the number of your Pokémon in play with damage counters on them. Put that many damage counters on the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Focus Energy
attacks.effect: During your next turn, Machoke's Mega Punch attack's base damage is 80.

attacks.name: Plasma
attacks.effect: If there are any Lightning Energy card in your discard pile, flip a coin. If heads, attach 1 of them to Electrode.

attacks.name: Selfdestruct
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to each Pokémon on each player's Bench. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Electrode does 100 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Warp Hole
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, choose a card from your discard pile and put it on top of your deck.

attacks.name: Do the Wave
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage times the number of Pokémon you have in play.

attacks.name: Hypnosplash
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Aqua Trick
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon has any Energy cards attached to it, flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of those Energy cards and move it to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. If your opponent has no Benched Pokémon, ignore this effect.

attacks.name: Sharp Claws
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Squeeze
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Metal Tail
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, you may flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 80 damage. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Energy Burst
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage times the number of Energy attached to Starmie and the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Star Back
attacks.effect: Attach a basic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Giant Tail
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Lightning Sphere
attacks.effect: You may flip a coin. If heads, discard all Lightning Energy cards attached to Raikou. This attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage for each Energy card discarded in this way.

attacks.name: Zzzap
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to each Pokémon with a Poké-Body or Poké-Power (yours and your opponent's). (Don't apply Weakness or Resistance.)

attacks.name: Lightning Storm
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, put 2 damage counters on Raichu.

attacks.name: Spiral Punch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Sudden Growth
attacks.effect: Attach any number of basic Energy cards from your hand to Politoed.

attacks.name: Frog Hop
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Energy Splash
attacks.effect: Move 2 Water Energy cards attached to Politoed to 1 or 2 of your Benched Pokémon. (You may put both on the same Pokémon or 1 each on 2 different Pokémon.) If you have no Benched Pokémon, ignore this effect.

attacks.name: Freezing Breath
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Trample
attacks.effect: For each Benched Pokémon (yours and your opponent's), flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Spook
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Double Claw
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage for each heads

attacks.name: Collect Fire
attacks.effect: If there are any Fire Energy cards in your discard pile, flip a coin. If heads, attach 1 of them to Moltres.

attacks.name: Burning Tail
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy card attached to Moltres.

attacks.name: Bounce Off
attacks.effect: If Magneton and the Defending Pokémon don't have the same number of Energy cards attached to them, the player controlling the Active Pokémon with the fewest number of Energy cards attached to it switches 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon with his or her Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Magnetic Wave
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage plus 10 damage times the number of your Benched Pokémon minus the number of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (For example, if your opponent has 1 Benched Pokémon and you have 3, this attack will do 30 damage plus 20 more damage.)

attacks.name: Electric Blast
attacks.effect: You may discard all Lightning Energy cards attached to Magneton when you use this attack. If you do, put damage counters equal to the amount of Energy cards removed in this way on any number of your opponent's Benched Pokémon in the way you like. (For example, if you discard 3 Lightning Energy cards, you can put 1 damage counter on 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and 2 on another.)

attacks.name: Crushing Lava
attacks.effect: You may discard a Fire or Fighting basic Energy card attached to Magcargo. If you discard a Fire Energy card in this way, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned. If you discard a Fighting Energy card in this way, this attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Eruption
attacks.effect: Each player discard the top card of his or her deck. This attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage for each Fire Energy card discarded in this way.

attacks.name: Fire Stream
attacks.effect: Discard a Fire Energy card attached to Magcargo in order to use this attack. If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, this attack does 10 damage to each of them. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Drag Off
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, if your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and switch it with the Defending Pokémon. If your opponent has no Benched Pokémon, ignore this effect.

attacks.name: Hurricane Punch
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Pollen Shield
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, Ledian can't become affected by a Special Condition. (Any other effects of attacks, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, and Trainer cards still happen.)

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dual Cut
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 50 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Thundershock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Thunderspark
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each Benched Pokémon with at least 1 Energy card attached to it (yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Ambush
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Lonely Fang
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage plus 20 damage times the number of your opponent's Benched Pokémon minus the number of your Benched Pokémon. (For example, if your opponent has 3 Benched Pokémon and you have 1, this attack will do 30 damage plus 40 more damage.)

attacks.name: Dragon's Vengeance
attacks.effect: If Gyarados has 7 or more damage counters on it, this attack's base damage is 100.

attacks.name: Hydrokinesis
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Spinning Blow
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads. If both coins are heads, switch Forretress with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Scatterbomb
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. For each heads, do 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. For each tails, do 10 damage to each of your own Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Burn Booster
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy card attached to Flareon in order to use this attack. If the discarded card is a Fire Energy card, this attack does 40 damage plus 10 more damage.

attacks.name: Freeze Lock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent can't attach Energy cards from his or her hand to his or her Active Pokémon during his or her next turn.

attacks.name: Crushing Ice
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 damage plus 10 more damage for each Colorless Energy in the Defending Pokémon's Retreat Cost. Damage is calculated using the Defending Pokémon's Retreat Cost after applying effects to the Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Double Cross
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads. If both of them are tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused and Poisoned.

attacks.name: Needle Rush
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. If you get 1 heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage. If you get 2 heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage. If you get 3 heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 50 more damage. If you get 4 heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 90 more damage.

attacks.name: Freeze Solid
attacks.effect: If there are any Water Energy cards in your discard pile, flip a coin. If heads, attach 1 of them to Articuno.

attacks.name: Ice Cyclone
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. If tails, this attack does 10 damage to each of your Pokémon in play. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Shake
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon, if any.

attacks.name: White Flames
attacks.effect: Discard all Fire Energy cards attached to Arcanine.

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rising Lunge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage.
